playwright.description: Browse SPA documentation, Swagger UI, and interactive API explorers. Essential for the researcher persona — skip tool-search deferral.

atlassian.description: Read Jira issues (requirements context) and search Confluence pages (internal API docs/architecture). Non-essential — loaded on demand.

microsoft-learn.description: Search official Microsoft/Azure documentation (microsoft_docs_search/fetch). Non-essential — loaded on demand.
